Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC09A "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Pile-Up.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c480 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $c400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pile-Up.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $C400 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
